module.KillAura.description: Automatically attacks the nearest living entity within range. Supports Single and Multi target modes with adjustable delay.
module.MaceSwap.description: Swaps to your mace when attacking and resets back to your previous item afterward.
module.WindAura.description: Fires wind charges at nearby target entities automatically.
module.MaceKill: Instantly kills entities using Mace fall damage mechanic
module.MaceKill.description: Increases fall height or damage mechanics specifically tailored to one-shot entities with the Mace.
module.Velocity: Reduces or removes knockback received from hits
module.Velocity.description: Modifies the knockback velocity applied when taking damage. Adjust horizontal and vertical percentages independently.
module.Trigger.description: Automatically swings and attacks when looking at a valid target entity within range. Includes smart cooldown check.
module.AutoCrystal.description: Aggressively places and breaks End Crystals to deal massive damage to nearby players or enemies. Highly configurable place/break speeds.
module.OffHand: Automatically puts golden apples, totems or crystals in offhand
module.OffHand.description: Keeps your offhand populated with Gapples, Totems, or Crystals depending on your health and safety.
module.MainHand: Automatically swaps items to main hand
module.MainHand.description: Manages your main hand active slot automatically for specific tasks.
module.HitSound: Plays a custom sound when hitting an entity
module.HitSound.description: Triggers customized auditory feedback whenever you land a hit on an entity.
module.NoFall.description: Negates fall damage using various methods. Packet mode sends ground packets, Ground mode spoofs on-ground state.
module.FastLadder.description: Increases the speed at which you climb up ladders and vines.
module.FastSwim.description: Significantly accelerates swimming speed in water and other liquids.
module.Fly.description: Enables survival mode flight with configurable speeds and movement modes.
module.AirJump: Allows you to jump in mid-air
module.AirJump.description: Allows you to perform multi-jumps even when there are no blocks beneath you.
module.Jesus: Allows you to walk on water
module.Jesus.description: Allows walking, running, and placing blocks on liquid surfaces as if they were solid.
module.Timer: Speeds up or slows down the game speed
module.Timer.description: Alters the client-side tickrate to speed up player actions and movement.
module.Sneak: Forces your character to sneak constantly
module.Sneak.description: Forces sneaking state so you never walk off edges and hide your name tag.
module.Scaffold: Automatically places blocks beneath your feet
module.Scaffold.description: Builds bridges and paths automatically under your feet with custom delays and Instant/KeepY options.
module.FullBright.description: Increases the gamma level to maximum for full visibility in dark areas. Alternative Potion mode uses night vision.
module.ESP.description: Renders a colored outline or box around entities, making them visible through walls. Multiple color and style options available.
module.Notifications: Displays custom HUD notifications for events
module.Notifications.description: Shows smooth pop-up messages on your screen for module state changes, friends, and other events.
module.Hud: Open the HUD editor to arrange and toggle HUD elements
module.Hud.description: Opens the HUD editor screen where you can freely move, resize, and toggle HUD elements on or off.
module.FreeLook: Allows you to look around without changing movement direction
module.FreeLook.description: Decouples the camera orientation from your player's actual look/movement direction.
module.NameTags: Renders custom, informative name tags above players
module.NameTags.description: Replaces standard entity nametags with premium, custom-styled nametags containing health, gear, and ping info.
module.BlockOutline: Customizes the appearance of block selection outline
module.BlockOutline.description: Modifies colors, width, and filling of the bounding box highlighting the block you are looking at.
module.PotatoMode: Saves CPU and RAM under extreme loads
module.PotatoMode.description: Optimizes Minecraft client resource consumption. Limits background/unfocused FPS to 15, cleans JVM memory regularly, and disables heavy Discord RPC.
module.SmallUser: Visually scales down the player model size
module.SmallUser.description: Allows visually changing the scale of your player model or forcing a baby model size.
module.ShiftInterp.description: Smoothes out the vertical camera drop and model height changes during sneaking.
module.ElytraSwap.description: Automatically swaps your chestplate with an elytra from your inventory. Supports Swap, EquipElytra, and EquipChestplate modes.
module.AutoTool: Automatically selects the best tool for breaking blocks
module.AutoTool.description: Selects the fastest tool in your hotbar for the block you are currently mining.
module.AntiHunger: Reduces hunger depletion when performing actions
module.AntiHunger.description: Spoofs movement packets to prevent food exhaustion while running and jumping.
module.AutoReconnect: Automatically reconnects to server after being disconnected
module.AutoReconnect.description: Attempts to reconnect to the server automatically after being disconnected, with a configurable delay.
module.AutoFarm.description: Automatically breaks fully grown crops within range. Can optionally replant new seeds after breaking.
module.AutoMount.description: Forces the player to mount horses, donkeys, boats, or minecarts automatically.
module.BoneMeal: Automatically applies bone meal to crops
module.BoneMeal.description: Applies bone meal to growing plants in range to grow them instantly.
module.DiscordStatus: Displays VoltHack status on Discord RPC
module.DiscordStatus.description: Shows a premium game status with VoltHack logo, elapsed play time, and module statistics on Discord.
module.AutoAuth: Automatically logs in on cracked servers
module.AutoAuth.description: Executes login or register commands automatically upon joining cracked servers.
module.PacketCanceller.description: Prevents specified outgoing network packets from being sent to the server.
module.AutoFish: Automatically reels in and casts fishing rod
module.AutoFish.description: Automatically reels in the bobber and casts again when a fish is caught.
module.MessageAura: Sends automated chat messages to nearby players
module.MessageAura.description: Sends customizable automated messages to other players in the server lobby or nearby area.
module.AutoSign: Automatically writes text on placed signs
module.AutoSign.description: Fills out sign text automatically using pre-configured lines whenever a sign block is placed.
module.SourceFiller.description: Places buckets of water or lava to fill empty flowing blocks automatically.
module.PingSpoof: Simulates higher latency to the server
module.PingSpoof.description: Delays keepalive packets to pretend your connection latency is higher than it is.
